qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal in log clearing endpoint allows arbitrary file truncation via sudo
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding is in RaspAP, but it identifies ajax/logging/clearlog.php path traversal leading to sudo truncate file truncation; the advisory fix targets includes/locale.php locale validation for authenticated OS command injection.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No manifest-listed qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or equivalent root cause. GHSA-4wwf-f7w3-94f5/CVE-2026-24788 is an authenticated RaspAP OS command injection fixed by validating locale input in includes/locale.php before applying LANG; the manifest-listed qualifying finding instead covers a different RaspAP log-clearing path traversal.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-4wwf-f7w3-94f5 describes authenticated OS command injection in billz/raspap-webgui before 3.3.6.
The referenced fix commit f514f5a12ef0c34853b5370ef55d630b499f977d changes includes/locale.php, adds valid locale checking, and documents mitigation for OS Command Injection (CWE-78).
path-traversal-log-clearing/vulnerability_report.json reports ajax/logging/clearlog.php path traversal into sudo truncate and explicitly distinguishes escapeshellarg behavior from shell injection.
